name: Quick-Cooked Tomatillo-Chile Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 pound fresh tomatillos (11 medium), husked and washed
1 large clove garlic, peeled and chopped
2 cups low sodium chicken broth, defatted
recipeInstructions:
1. Have the measure of broth ready.
2. Cook fresh serrano or jalapeno peppers in boiling salted water until tender (about 5 minutes). If using fresh tomatillos, cook them with chiles.
3. Place tomatillos and chiles in a blender or food processor, along with cilantro, onion, and garlic. Stir.
4. Process until smooth, but retain a little texture.
5. Heat oil in a medium-large non-stick skillet set over medium-high heat. When the oil is hot enough to make a drop of the puree sizzle, add it.
